story.title: Startup founders urge U.S. government not to shut off Chinese open weight AI

draft:
I'm concerned that shutting off Chinese open-source AI could hinder global innovation. 
As a developer, I rely on open-source tools to build new products. 
Restricting access to these tools could stifle progress. 
Will limiting Chinese AI really protect US interests? 
#AI #opensource #techpolicy
